commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds opt-in git-backed workspace checkpoints around mutating coding tools, a checkpoints CLI/config/docs surface, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection gives a clear behavior path, but the linked after-fix proof is not currently verifiable for this PR head.
commands.review_followup: This is a draft, protected-label, data-touching feature with a security-sensitive policy decision and unverifiable proof, so it needs maintainer review rather than a narrow ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: feat: add workspace checkpoints
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds hidden git-backed workspace checkpoints before `write`, `edit`, `apply_patch`, and `exec` tool calls.
- Adds `openclaw checkpoints status/create/list/diff/restore` for manual checkpoint inspection and rollback.
- Documents checkpoint config, storage, excludes, limits, and restore behavior on a new docs page.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/workspace-checkpoints.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts` - 76 tests passed locally.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean after accepted fixes.
- `git diff --check` - passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/workspace-checkpoints.ts` - passed locally after the Testbox lint finding.
- `pnpm check:changed` via Crabbox/Testbox: `tbx_01krwjc777scqa1hexskdptxfa`, GitHub Actions https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26012057553, exit 0.
- Explicit checkpoint e2e via Crabbox/Testbox: `tbx_01krwjc792zvfs8k33y0nrprh1`, GitHub Actions https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26012057543, exit 0.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Hidden git-backed checkpoints are created before mutating agent tools and can be inspected/restored without creating a workspace `.git`.

Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox on Linux, plus local macOS focused tests.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: In a temp workspace, build OpenClaw, create a checkpoint, mutate a tracked file, mutate a gitignored non-excluded file, mutate an excluded `.env`, add a new file, replace `src/` with a file, diff the checkpoint, targeted-restore `src/app.ts`, then full-restore the original checkpoint hash with `--yes`.

Evidence after fix: Remote diff showed `note.txt`, `ignored.txt`, `new.txt`, and the file/directory conflict; targeted restore recreated `src/app.ts`; full restore reverted `note.txt` and `ignored.txt`, removed `new.txt`, preserved changed `.env`, kept the workspace free of `.git`, and listed both pre-restore checkpoints plus the original seed checkpoint.

Observed result after fix: Workspace returned to the original checkpointed state for included files while excluded secret-like state remained untouched; checkpoint history remained available for pre-restore recovery.

What was not tested: A full live model turn invoking actual write/edit/exec through a provider; covered at the tool wrapper, CLI, manager, and remote end-to-end simulation layers.
target.author: steipete
